implementation_note: Add these tags to each page head via Next.js metadata API. The 'pages' dict is keyed by a short identifier. Use the 'route' field to match the page.

home.og:title: ProofDrop
home.og:description: ProofDrop converts AIVS proof bundles into permanent, tamper-evident receipt URLs. Paste a bundle, get a PASS/FAIL in seconds, and share a clean receipt link...
home.twitter:title: ProofDrop
home.twitter:description: ProofDrop converts AIVS proof bundles into permanent, tamper-evident receipt URLs. Paste a bundle, get a PASS/FAIL in seconds, and share a clean receipt link...

pricing.og:title: Pricing - ProofDrop
pricing.og:description: Simple, transparent pricing for ProofDrop. Plans: Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise
pricing.twitter:title: Pricing - ProofDrop
pricing.twitter:description: Simple, transparent pricing for ProofDrop. Plans: Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise

feature-aivs-proof-bundle-verification.og:title: AIVS proof bundle verification - ProofDrop
feature-aivs-proof-bundle-verification.og:description: Accept JSON paste or file upload; validate AIVS schema with Zod; run deterministic PASS/FAIL verification using @protocol-factory/protocol-verifier; return conf
feature-aivs-proof-bundle-verification.twitter:title: AIVS proof bundle verification - ProofDrop
feature-aivs-proof-bundle-verification.twitter:description: Accept JSON paste or file upload; validate AIVS schema with Zod; run deterministic PASS/FAIL verification using @protocol-factory/protocol-verifier; return conf

feature-permanent-tamper-evident-recei.og:title: Permanent tamper-evident receipt - ProofDrop
feature-permanent-tamper-evident-recei.og:description: Derive receipt ID deterministically from bundle hash (rcpt_ + first 32 hex chars of SHA-256). Same bundle always produces same receipt URL. Store receipt in Neo
feature-permanent-tamper-evident-recei.twitter:title: Permanent tamper-evident receipt - ProofDrop
feature-permanent-tamper-evident-recei.twitter:description: Derive receipt ID deterministically from bundle hash (rcpt_ + first 32 hex chars of SHA-256). Same bundle always produces same receipt URL. Store receipt in Neo

feature-public-read-only-receipt-page-.og:title: Public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id]) - ProofDrop
feature-public-read-only-receipt-page-.og:description: No auth required. Shows PASS/FAIL badge, bundle ID, content hash, audit timeline (captured/verified/receipt created), verifier version. Expand to see raw bundle
feature-public-read-only-receipt-page-.twitter:title: Public read-only receipt page (/receipt/[id]) - ProofDrop
feature-public-read-only-receipt-page-.twitter:description: No auth required. Shows PASS/FAIL badge, bundle ID, content hash, audit timeline (captured/verified/receipt created), verifier version. Expand to see raw bundle

feature-google-oauth-sign-in.og:title: Google OAuth sign-in - ProofDrop
feature-google-oauth-sign-in.og:description: Optional sign-in with Google via NextAuth.js. Signed-in users get receipt history saved, higher rate limits, and access to dashboard and export features.
feature-google-oauth-sign-in.twitter:title: Google OAuth sign-in - ProofDrop
feature-google-oauth-sign-in.twitter:description: Optional sign-in with Google via NextAuth.js. Signed-in users get receipt history saved, higher rate limits, and access to dashboard and export features.

feature-dashboard-—-receipt-history.og:title: Dashboard — receipt history - ProofDrop
feature-dashboard-—-receipt-history.og:description: Authenticated users see paginated table of all their receipts: ID, status badge, date, view/export actions. Protected route — redirects to sign-in if unauthenti
feature-dashboard-—-receipt-history.twitter:title: Dashboard — receipt history - ProofDrop
feature-dashboard-—-receipt-history.twitter:description: Authenticated users see paginated table of all their receipts: ID, status badge, date, view/export actions. Protected route — redirects to sign-in if unauthenti

feature-stripe-subscription-billing.og:title: Stripe subscription billing - ProofDrop
feature-stripe-subscription-billing.og:description: Pricing page with Starter (9/mo) and Pro (49/mo) tiers. Checkout via Stripe. Webhook handler verifies signature and updates subscription tier in Neon. Billing p
feature-stripe-subscription-billing.twitter:title: Stripe subscription billing - ProofDrop
feature-stripe-subscription-billing.twitter:description: Pricing page with Starter (9/mo) and Pro (49/mo) tiers. Checkout via Stripe. Webhook handler verifies signature and updates subscription tier in Neon. Billing p

dashboard.og:title: Dashboard - ProofDrop
dashboard.og:description: Your ProofDrop dashboard. Manage your account, view history, and access all features.
dashboard.twitter:title: Dashboard - ProofDrop
dashboard.note: Dashboard pages are typically noindex - use these tags for social sharing only.
